background: Chapter 16 examined data from an experimental cohort that was part of the NIH-sponsored Women's Health Initiative study. This experimental cohort study involved 16,608 postmenopausal women. Roughly half these women were assigned conjugated estrogens (n1=8506). The remaining subjects (n2=8102) received a placebo. Coronary heart disease, invasive breast cancer, and other adverse outcomes were monitored in the groups on an ongoing basis.
